title: Icarus does undef propagation of const adds incorrectly

features.name: undef propagation in constant-only addition
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment where an X-literal constant is added to another constant, producing a result that requires X-propagation through the adder

features.name: undef propagation in constant-plus-variable addition for comparison
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment where an X-literal constant is added to a variable, to contrast with constant-only addition that exhibits the bug
